name: Narmer
role: First Pharaoh — Unifier of Upper and Lower Egypt (~3100 BCE)
quote: He who wears the double crown rules the Two Lands.

name: Khufu (Cheops)
role: Pharaoh — 4th Dynasty; Builder of the Great Pyramid of Giza (~2589–2566 BCE)
quote: I have built for you the eternal horizon of the Two Lands, so that you might rest forever.

name: Hatshepsut
role: Female Pharaoh — 18th Dynasty; ruled ~1479–1458 BCE. Builder, trader, one of Egypt's most successful rulers.
quote: I am the king's daughter, the king's wife, the god's wife, and the king's great wife.

name: Akhenaten
role: Pharaoh — 18th Dynasty; the 'Heretic King' who imposed Aten monotheism (~1352–1336 BCE)
quote: How manifold it is, what thou hast made! They are hidden from the face of man. O sole god, like whom there is no other.

name: Ramesses II
role: Pharaoh — 19th Dynasty; ruled 66 years (~1279–1213 BCE). Builder of Abu Simbel; signed world's first peace treaty.
quote: My hand is mighty, my arm is strong. My army is valiant, my soldiers are brave.

name: Cleopatra VII
role: Last Ptolemaic Pharaoh (51–30 BCE); last active ruler of ancient Egypt; allied with Caesar and Antony.
quote: I will not be led in triumph through Rome. I am Queen of Egypt.

name: Salah al-Din (Saladin)
role: Sultan of Egypt and Syria (1174–1193); founder of Ayyubid dynasty; recaptured Jerusalem 1187
quote: Jerusalem I will not give up while I live, for it is more precious to us than it is to you.

name: Muhammad Ali Pasha
role: Viceroy of Egypt (1805–1848); founder of modern Egypt; modernized army, industry, and administration
quote: I am not interested in the title of Pasha or Khedive. I want the substance of power.

name: Saad Zaghloul
role: Nationalist leader; led 1919 Revolution; founded Wafd Party; demanded Egyptian independence at Paris Peace Conference
quote: If one plus one equals one, then the people have one will, one voice, and one demand — independence.

name: Gamal Abdel Nasser
role: President of Egypt (1956–1970); leader of 1952 revolution; icon of pan-Arabism; nationalized Suez Canal
quote: The Suez Canal was built by our ancestors, and it will remain our property. We shall never relinquish our rights in it.

name: Anwar Sadat
role: President of Egypt (1970–1981); led October 1973 War; signed Camp David Accords; Nobel Peace Prize 1978; assassinated 1981
quote: Peace is much more precious than a piece of land. Let there be no more wars.

name: Hosni Mubarak
role: President of Egypt (1981–2011); maintained US alliance and Camp David peace; overthrown in 2011 revolution
quote: I won't run, I won't leave, and I won't be defeated. Egypt is my home and I will die on its soil.

name: Abdel Fattah el-Sisi
role: President of Egypt (2014–present); led 2013 military coup; oversaw austerity programs, BRICS accession, and Gaza mediation
quote: We need a different kind of thinking, a different kind of revolution — a religious revolution.

name: Mohammed Morsi
role: President of Egypt (June 2012–July 2013); Muslim Brotherhood's first elected president; deposed by Sisi; died in custody 2019
quote: The Egyptian people are the source of authority. Their will is the source of legitimacy.

name: Mohamed ElBaradei
role: IAEA Director General (1997–2009); Nobel Peace Prize 2005; Egyptian opposition figure; resigned as VP in 2013 over Raba'a massacre
quote: We need to change the culture of this victimhood mentality and start acting like a democracy.

name: Ahmed Urabi
role: Egyptian Colonel; led 1879–1882 nationalist revolt against Khedival misrule; 'Egypt for the Egyptians'; defeated at Tel el-Kebir by British
quote: God created us free, and did not create us as an inheritance or property. I swear to God that I will not be enslaved after today.

name: Khaled Said
role: Martyr — Alexandria youth beaten to death by police (June 2010). His death inspired the 'We Are All Khaled Said' Facebook page that mobilized the 2011 revolution.
quote: [Post by Wael Ghonim on 'We Are All Khaled Said' page]: 'Today they killed Khaled. If I don't act for his sake, tomorrow they will kill someone else, and no one will act for me.'

name: Wael Ghonim
role: Google executive; administrator of 'We Are All Khaled Said' Facebook page; key organizer of January 25 revolution call
quote: If you want to liberate a society, all you need is the internet.

name: Napoléon Bonaparte
role: French General; led Egyptian Expedition (1798–1801); defeated Mamluks at Battle of the Pyramids; brought savants who documented Egypt
quote: Soldiers! Forty centuries look down upon you from the top of these pyramids.

name: Ptolemy I Soter
role: Macedonian general; founded Ptolemaic dynasty (305 BCE); built Great Library and Pharos of Alexandria; first ruler to blend Greek and Egyptian culture
quote: Alexandria shall be the new center of the world's knowledge and commerce.
